Table 2: Probabilistic performance metrics. Lower values are preferred for all, best result for a backbone in bold.

Figure 10: Test set data distribution in SimBarcaSpd. The data from 26 test set sessions are plotted (colored by session) according to their timestamp in a day. The scatter plot clearly shows that the traffic speed at these segments has multiple modes, e.g., a congested mode and a free-flow mode.
Table 3: Relative CRPS improvement (%) of GMM over deterministic variants
Figure 12: One, five, and ten step predictions of LGC (GMM) for road segment 806 in SimBarcaSpd. The density ridges are colored for better visualization.
Figure 11: The 30-minute-ahead predictions (10 steps) of LGC (GMM) for a high-trafficdemand scenario in SimBarcaSpd. The density ridges are colored for better visualization.
Figure 2: Transforming a deterministic model (left) to a probabilistic predictor (middle) with a GMM prediction layer (right).
